llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution describes a purchase property at 145 Sterling Rd, Unit 307, Toronto, ON — a converted industrial loft in the Junction Triangle neighborhood. Among the ground-truth purchase options, this most closely aligns with the 'Commercial Conversion' property: both feature industrial conversion, creative workspace suitability, good natural light, exposed brick, and are within budget (CAD $380K–$465K). For financing, the assistant chose 'Scotiabank – Joint Mortgage', which matches the 'Traditional Mortgage' type (standard bank, 80% LTV, higher down payment, no first-time buyer program mentioned).
